title: Less Protected
description: Minecraft armor is WAY too strong. Half a heart from Sharpness V netherite sword crit?! Rebalance armor in a configurable way.
body:
# Less Protected
*Less Protected* adds simple and configurable options for weakening (or strengthening) armor.

## Configuration Options
- modify_non_players `default: false`
- armorToughnessModifer `default: 1.0`
- armorModifier `default: 0.8`
- protectionModifier `default: 0.5`
